```{=html}
<div style="position:relative;width:92%;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5em 0 0.5em;">

 <div style="position:absolute;left:8%;right:8%;top:3.4em;height:3px;background:repeating-linear-gradient(to right,#C4C3E8 0,#C4C3E8 8px,transparent 8px,transparent 16px);z-index:0;"></div>

 <div style="position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;z-index:1;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:50%;background:#3DA18A;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(61,161,138,0.35);border:4px solid #F8F7F0;">01</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.55em;">~ 25 min</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;margin-top:0.35em;line-height:1.25;">Components</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.45;max-width:11em;">What's inside a harness.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:50%;background:#C4881A;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.35);border:4px solid #F8F7F0;">02</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.55em;">~ 25 min</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-top:0.35em;line-height:1.25;">Practices</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.45;max-width:11em;">What works.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:50%;background:#D45F47;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.35);border:4px solid #F8F7F0;">03</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.55em;">~ 25 min</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;margin-top:0.35em;line-height:1.25;">Design Your Own</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.45;max-width:11em;">Staged path to your harness.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1.6em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  goal &nbsp;<span style="color:#5654A2;">→</span>&nbsp; <span style="color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">stop at the earliest stage that works</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
